change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: Activity 1.1 Kick-off meetings with governmental stakeholdersActivity 1.2 Demonstration of landslide Mitigation worksActivity 1.3 Planning workshops and revision of preparedness and response planActivity 1.4 Development of landslide and flood risk mapsActivity 1.5 Sub-categorization of CAT II householdsActivity 1.6 Awareness raising on CAT II mitigation measures and basic emergency preparedness trainingsActivity 1.7 Relocation of CAT III householdsActivity 1.8. Facilitate implementation of RRCG and climate smart approaches for road constructionActivity 1.9. Raising awareness on agricultural practices as a factor of landslidesActivity 1.10. Advocacy to strengthen implementation of landslide disaster preparedness and mitigation Activity 2.1 Facilitate Community of Practice (CoP) technical subgroup on landslide forecasting and EWSActivity 2.2 Technology-based early warning message dissemination improvementsActivity 2.3 Landslide forecasting and EWS improvements in at-risk communitiesActivity 2.4 Capacity building of 4 municipalities in Forecast based Action (FbA)Activity 2.5 Support minimal functionality of EOCs for the communities at risk of landslides and floodsActivity 2.6 Development of FBA protocols with EOCs for the communities at risk of landslide and floodActivity 2.7 Identification and signaling of evacuation sitesActivity 2.8 SIMEX Activity 3.1 SRSP capacity building and orientations on the potential of SRSP for local authoritiesActivity 3.2 Study on System Disruptions for SSA and PMEPActivity 3.3 Assisting municipalities in strengthening understanding on how to best use SSA and PMEP in case of crisisActivity 3.4 Desktop simulationActivity 3.5 Development of “design tweaks”Activity 3.6 Field SimulationActivity 3.7 Evidence-based advocacy on SRSP at all levels including continuation of the national dialogue platform on SRSP

snapshot.executing_agency: Ministry of Women, Children and Senior Citizens, Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of Energy, Water Resources and Irrigation

en.full: Together for Disaster Preparedness and Early Action in Landslide Affected Hill Areas of Nepal “Pratibaddha 2”
